name: Savoury Vegetarian Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Clove garlic, peeled and forced through a press
Several grindings freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tofu and slice thinly. Place on a paper towel-lined baking sheet and cover with several cans to weigh down. Let drain for 45 minutes.
2. In a nonstick skillet heat 2 teaspoons oil over medium heat. Add the onion, carrot, cabbage, and garlic; sauté 5 minutes. Cool slightly.
3. Process the drained tofu in a food processor until creamy. Add the flour, nutritional yeast, ketchup, parsley, sesame seeds, taco seasoning, cayenne pepper, salt, and freshly ground black pepper. Process until smooth. Add the vegetables and process until finely chopped and incorporated.
4. Form the mixture into 4 patties and dredge in wheat germ. Heat 1 teaspoon oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add the burgers and cook for 5 minutes. Turn and add another teaspoon of oil; continue cooking for 4 minutes, or until heated through. Serve on toasted buns with condiments.
Note: Nutritional yeast can be found in health food stores. If unavailable, substitute with 2 tablespoons wheat germ.
